title: Skill generator cannot introspect validator phases or SDK query functions — new capabilities require narrative updates
body: The skill generator introspects tools, commands, events, shortcuts, and resource directories. It cannot introspect internal function behavior — validator phases and SDK query functions are invisible. When new validation checks or SDK capabilities are added, they only surface in the skill if the narrative (skill-narrative.md) is manually updated. The agent vocabulary extractor (extractAgentVocabulary) proved the pattern: export a registry, generator reads it, produces a vocabulary section. The validator now exports validationChecks() returning 11 check descriptors (commit 6fc1611), and the SDK exports agentContracts() and agentsByBlock(). The registries exist — what remains is generator integration: add extractValidationVocabulary() that calls validationChecks() and produces a <validation_vocabulary> section, parallel to <agent_vocabulary>, <planning_vocabulary>, and <monitor_vocabulary>.
resolved_by: commit 4dffeec — extractValidationVocabulary() added to generator, produces <validation_vocabulary> table from validationChecks() registry
